title: MC:PS1 - Modpack
description: An exploration style modpack with ps1 style graphics!
body:
# An exploration style modpack with ps1 style graphics! Do you miss the old days of Minecraft, when everything was mysterious and spooky? Do you want to experience the game with retro graphics and sounds? Then this modpack is for you! It will emulate the beta version of Minecraft, with PS1-style(Playstation 1-Style) visuals and creepy atmosphere. You better watch out..there might be someone watching beyond the fog.
### 📝 | From the Modpack Creator This mod was made because other "scary" mods were just plain ol' annoying. You would be damaged until you were killed randomly without any reason. While it was scary at first, the longer you played and actually progressed, the more annoying it became just dying randomly. This mod aims to fix those issues and instead will damage you for a lower amount of health reducing the chances you die. *Why not just remove the damage part overall?* Well I've tried this, and it was just not scary. The fact that you had no reason to run away from them killed away the scariness. Thats why I decided to just reduce the damage output so it would lower the chances of you dying.
**Please leave a feedback or report issues by clicking [this](https://github.com/noneeeeeeeeeee/MC-PS1) link or clicking the issues tab located the left side (On the "Links" Tab)**
### 📌 | Legend Incase there are some abbreviations that you didn't understand, here they are! - MC = Minecraft - PS1 = Playstation 1 - FTF = From the Fog - This is a mod that is included in the modpack. It is **recommended** to configure it before starting your playthrough, scroll down till you see **FTF** for the recommended configuration. ## 🚨 | Important ### ©️ | Crediting - You may include this modpack in your video/foto/post just put a link in the description that links it back to this page! - Forking is modpack is also allowed but just clarify its a fork! **Example Description:** ``` Modpack I used: https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcps1 ````
### ⚙️ | Setting Up Notes - **When installing the modpack via a launcher** double check the version you want to install. - When first launching the modpack please check the **shaders** and the **resourcepack** menu. Make sure the shaders are enabled and also make sure the **Golden Days** resourcepack is enabled. - When your using the **1.0a** modpack make sure to install optifine (located below this message)
Optifine for version 1.0a ## 🔍 | Optifine (Required ONLY in alpha 1.0a) This modpack **requires** optifine. Because of copyright I can't include it here. Please download it [here](http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.19.2_HD_U_I2.jar&x=78d9/) and place it in the **Mods** folder. Just drag and drop it, you do not need to install it. *PS: If you do not know how still, just search(on google)* **"Installing Optifine for Forge"**
*PS: This is only for version 1.0a future versions will already have oculus built in*
### 📝 | FAQ - **Finding the server files?** (This has been merged with the client to prevent confusion) - Click on the version you want to download. Then scroll down until you find a file labeled **[VERSION - Server] MC:PS1**. That will be the server file. - Note if the server file stays the same in one release it probably is still compatible with the one you downloaded. (Example, You downloaded client ver. 1.1.0b and server 1.0.5b on the same release. Then you want to upgrade the client side to 1.1.1b but when you scroll down the server is still on ver 1.0.5b. That means it's fine to just update on the client side.) - **The game feels laggy/Why is the fps capped at 30?** - This is intentional meant to capture the feeling of old consoles where you are forced on lower graphics, - You may turn up the fps cap, but this is not recommended(as always, it'll ruin the immersion) ### 🔄 | Version Support | Version | Support? | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | 1.13-1.19.1 | ❌ Not Planned | | 1.19.2 | ✔️ Supported (EOL) | | 1.20.1 | **✔️ Supported** | | 1.21.x | ⌛ Planned | EOL (End Of Life) = It will no longer recieve updates, bugfixes, or any patches **WARNING:** 1.21.x Might not be possible. I will push a major update to 1.20.1 Instead if it isn't possible **WARNING2:** 1.21.x Seems to not be possible.. I might have to migrate to fabric. Stay tuned! ## 🤫 | What's Inside? What the mod looks like. Spoilers will be marked as **spoilers**, You'll know when it's a spoiler when you see one.

You can see more images in the Gallery tab.
**WARNING:** The spoiler images will be marked as **[SPOILER]** in the gallery tab. Watch out! ![Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQz3JzEd/images/96cf8485e6cf558aa7eb599b504ae7933ed39a53.png) ![Autumn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQz3JzEd/images/168848605343008fe930eaf58af83c735c7fd4b9.png) ![Mining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQz3JzEd/images/cabd875fd06a0f01e753ab03b4155c7f2f88e921.png)
SPOILER - IMG1 ![What is that?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQz3JzEd/images/38296a173d67a19ed31dee94dd07912c3394c95e.png)
SPOILER - Video Showcase
## ☑️ | Recommended Configuration Some of the mods here do not have a dedicated config file available. Thus I will put it here for the recommended configs. ### 1. 🖥️ | System Requirements Yes I know this is not a mod.. but its for you to have a good time with this mod.
The default config set by your launcher is usually good enough.
WARNING: Technical (Maybe confusing) Depending on how you play. Your performance may vary. This is used just as a baseline of the system requirements
On the bottom of this spoiler you can see the notes I placed for more information  
**Client Side** | System Requirements | Minimum | Recommended | |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:| | CPU | - | - | | GPU | Integrated | integrated | | **RAM** | 2.5GB | 4GB | | Storage | 2GB | 5GB | **Server Side** | System Requirements | Minimum (2-5 Players) | Recommended (6-10 Players) | |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:| | CPU | Intel i5 Gen 4 | - | | GPU | Integrated | integrated | | **RAM** | 2GB or 4GB | 6GB | | Storage | 5GB | 10GB | ***Server:** Note that you and your players playstyle may vary. Just remember minecraft hogs so much ram, so the more you give it the better. If your server is crashing try increasing the ram (that usually helps) ***Storage:** For storage it depends whether you like exploring or not (or your players). The more you explore the bigger size the world will be. Keep that in mind
### 2. FTF(From the Fog) This is the recommended config for From the Fog.
Click below to see the table (it is pretty long)
FTF - Table Enabled = ✔️
Disabled = ❌
Something Else = Read | Config Name | Option | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | **Page 1** | | Sighting Chance | Uncommon | | Haunting Delay | 3 Days | | Ghost Doors| ✔️ | | Creeping Mechanic | ✔️ | | Stalking Mechanic | ✔️ | | Lurking Mechanic| ✔️ | | **Page 2** | | Disappearing Torches | ❌| | Burning Base | ❌| | Sighting Noise | ✔️ | | Emissive Layers | ✔️| | Herobrine Skin | Randomize & Custom Skins Off | | Lurking Language | User Choice | | **Page 3** | | Jumpscare Mechanic| ✔️| | Crash Mechanic| ❌| | Creeping Vanishing Delay | None | | Stalking Vanishing Delay | 0.5s or None | | No Sleep | ❌ | | Dreadful Donation | ✔️ | | **Page 4**| | Crimson Curse | ❌ | | OG Shrine Mechanic | ❌ | | Nightmare Mechanic | ✔️ | | Window Watcher | ✔️ | | Chilled Candles |❌ | | Sinister Signs | ✔️ | | **Page 5** | | Sighting Sense | ✔️ | | Nametag | Off | | Rekindling Shrine | ❌| | Advancements | ✔️ | | Fearful Footsteps | ✔️ | | Shrine Surprise| ❌| | **Page 6**| | Ghost Miner |✔️ | | Give it Control | ❌|

## 📄 | Crediting There are some of the mods here that require crediting. - Uses [Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse) - Shaders [MCSX](https://github.com/ckosmic/minecraft-psx) - Shaders Used (Versions 1.20.1 and above) [MCSX](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcps1/changelog) - Uses [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) above version 1.0a
